tasks.subject: Task 1: mode2_profile binary format + parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define the mode2_profile binary struct and a host-testable parser.

**Files:** Create tools/shared/gbl_mode2_profile.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/Internal/Mode2Profile.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/Mode2Profile.c, tests/host/helpers/mode2_harness.c, tests/host/076_mode2_profile_parse.sh; Modify tests/host/helpers/Makefile.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/076_mode2_profile_parse.sh -> PASS: 076 mode2 profile parse

Full code in plan doc Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/shared/gbl_mode2_profile.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/Internal/Mode2Profile.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/Mode2Profile.c", "tests/host/helpers/mode2_harness.c", "tests/host/helpers/Makefile", "tests/host/076_mode2_profile_parse.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/076_mode2_profile_parse.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gbl_mode2_profile is 120 bytes via _Static_assert", "gbl_mode2_profile_parse rejects bad size/magic/version/reserved/is_unlocked/color and accepts well-formed", "tests/host/076 passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GBLP1 parser — locate the 0x0010 entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the GBLP1 parser to return the mode2_profile (type 0x0010) entry, reusing the entry-walk integrity checks.

**Files:** Modify GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/Internal/PayloadParse.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/PayloadParse.c, tests/host/helpers/parser_harness.c; Create tests/host/077_gblp1_find_mode2_profile.sh.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/077_gblp1_find_mode2_profile.sh -> PASS: 077 gblp1 find mode2_profile

Full code in plan doc Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/Internal/PayloadParse.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/PayloadParse.c", "tests/host/helpers/parser_harness.c", "tests/host/077_gblp1_find_mode2_profile.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/077_gblp1_find_mode2_profile.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gbl_payload_find_mode2_profile returns OK/NO_MODE2_PROFILE/integrity-errors correctly", "gbl_payload_find_cached_abl unchanged (061/063 still pass)", "tests/host/077 passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: GblPayloadLib reader — GblPayload_LoadMode2Profile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose a public EDK2 API that locates the GBLP1 overlay, finds the 0x0010 entry, parses it, returns a validated struct gbl_mode2_profile.

**Files:** Modify GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/GblPayloadLib.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/GblPayload.c, GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/GblPayloadLib.inf.

**Verify:** ./scripts/build.sh --mode 1 -> ==> Built dist/mode-1.efi

Full code in plan doc Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/GblPayloadLib.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/GblPayload.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/GblPayloadLib.inf"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/build.sh --mode 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GblPayload_LoadMode2Profile returns SUCCESS/NOT_FOUND/LOAD_ERROR correctly", "dist/mode-1.efi still builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: --mode 2 build wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make scripts/build.sh --mode 2 a valid build producing dist/mode-2.efi; update mode taxonomy docs + lint.

**Files:** Modify scripts/build.sh, GblChainloadPkg/GblChainloadPkg.dsc, README.md, tests/045_mode_taxonomy_lint.sh.

**Verify:** ./scripts/build.sh --mode 2 -> ==> Built dist/mode-2.efi

Full detail in plan doc Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build.sh", "GblChainloadPkg/GblChainloadPkg.dsc", "README.md", "tests/045_mode_taxonomy_lint.sh"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/build.sh --mode 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build.sh --mode 2 produces dist/mode-2.efi", "build.sh --mode 3 still rejects", "tests/045_mode_taxonomy_lint.sh passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mode-2 rewrite logic (pure, host-testable)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the pure-logic KM/SPSS buffer rewrites in a host-testable source file.

**Files:** Create GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Rewrite.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Rewrite.c, tests/host/078_mode2_rewrite.sh; Modify tests/host/helpers/mode2_harness.c, tests/host/helpers/Makefile.

**Verify:** bash tests/host/078_mode2_rewrite.sh -> PASS: 078 mode2 rewrite

Full code in plan doc Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Rewrite.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Rewrite.c", "tests/host/helpers/mode2_harness.c", "tests/host/helpers/Makefile", "tests/host/078_mode2_rewrite.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/078_mode2_rewrite.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gbl_m2_rewrite_km rewrites only the 4 target cmd-ids at matching wire size, bounds-safe", "0x208 rewrite sets IsUnlocked/PublicKey/Color/SystemVersion/SPL from profile", "tests/host/078 passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Mode2Overlay — EDK2 glue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the GBL_MODE==2 overlay module: a process-global validated-profile holder + policy entrypoints.

**Files:** Create GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Overlay.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Overlay.c; Modify GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ProtocolHookLib.inf.

**Verify:** ./scripts/build.sh --mode 2 -> ==> Built dist/mode-2.efi

Full code in plan doc Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Overlay.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/Mode2Overlay.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ProtocolHookLib.inf"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/build.sh --mode 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Mode2Overlay body fully gated GBL_MODE==2", "Mode2_SetProfile stores copy + Mode2_HasProfile flips true; no-op before set", "dist/mode-2.efi builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wire rewrite into QseecomHook + SpssHook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Call the mode-2 rewrite policy from the live hooks under #if (GBL_MODE == 2).

**Files:** Modify GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/QseecomHook.c, GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/SpssHook.c.

**Verify:** ./scripts/build.sh --mode 2 && ./scripts/build.sh --mode 1 -> both print ==> Built ...

Full detail in plan doc Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/QseecomHook.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/SpssHook.c"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/build.sh --mode 2 && ./scripts/build.sh --mode 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HookedSendCmd calls Mode2Policy_RewriteKmSend once on first-entry before forward", "HookedShareKeyMintInfo calls Mode2Policy_RewriteSpss before forward", "modes 0/1 still build"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: BootFlow profile load + InstallAll required hooks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** In a mode-2 build, load the profile before chain-load and hand it to Mode2Overlay; make Qseecom+SPSS required; record warning state on missing/invalid profile.

**Files:** Modify GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/BootFlow.c, GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/InstallAll.c.

**Verify:** ./scripts/build.sh --mode 2 -> ==> Built dist/mode-2.efi

Full code in plan doc Task 8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/BootFlow.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/InstallAll.c"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/build.sh --mode 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BootFlow loads profile, Mode2_SetProfile on success, warning on failure, honest boot", "InstallAll mode-2 makes Qseecom+SPSS FATAL", "mode-0/1 InstallAll unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: FastbootLib mode-2 profile warning line
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a red mode-2-profile warning line to gbl-chainload's fastboot screen, modeled on AVB WARNING.

**Files:** Modify edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c, edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/BootLib/FastbootMenu.c.

**Verify:** ./scripts/build.sh --mode 2 -> ==> Built dist/mode-2.efi

Full detail in plan doc Task 9.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/FastbootLib/FastbootCmds.c", "edk2/QcomModulePkg/Library/BootLib/FastbootMenu.c"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/build.sh --mode 2", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GblFastbootSetMode2Warning/GetMode2Warning store+retrieve correctly", "FastbootMenu renders MODE-2 line red when non-empty", "dist/mode-2.efi builds"]}
```
